__comment__: Per-symbol event blackout dates (earnings/results, board meetings, known corporate actions). Format: SYMBOL -> list of dates as YYYY-MM-DD (IST). When enable_earnings_blackout is on, the scanner will NOT open a new position in a symbol whose date falls within [date - earnings_blackout_days_before, date + earnings_blackout_days_after]. Symbols not listed here (or with an empty list) are NEVER blocked (fail-open). Populate these with your watchlist's real upcoming results dates from the NSE 'Forthcoming Results / Board Meetings' page. Manual trades are not affected — this only gates the automated scanner.
